description: The Numeric Value Spatial Variable Driver`1 component works specifically for numeric values and allows for multiple sampling modes.

fields.Drive: The field to drive with the resulting value.
fields.VariableName: The variable name to sample for.
fields.Mode: How to interpret the sampled values.
fields.DefaultValue: The value to default to if no value can be sampled.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide a field to drive and a variable name. the slot this component is on acts as the position for sampling variable values.
